summary: Frontend testing completed for Digital Twin feature. All UI components render correctly after the JSX parsing fix. The page loads successfully after login, all form fields are present, Twin Type and Visual Style selectors work correctly, and Back to Gallery navigation functions properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital Twin feature frontend is fully functional. The JSX parsing error on line 162 (escaped quote in placeholder) was fixed by changing 'e.g., 5'10"' to 'e.g., 5ft 10in'. All form fields, selectors, and navigation work correctly.

digital_twins_page_loads.details: Page loads correctly at /digital-twins after login with title 'Digital Twin Studio'

create_digital_twin_form_renders.details: All 9 form fields render correctly: Name, Hair Color, Eye Color, Skin Tone, Face Shape, Height, Build, Distinctive Features, Style Keywords

twin_type_selector.details: All 6 Twin Types work: 2D Avatar, 3D Avatar, Full Body, Headshot, Stylized, Realistic. Selection updates Twin Capabilities section correctly.

visual_style_selector.details: All 8 Visual Styles work: Photorealistic, Fashion Editorial, Commercial, Artistic, Anime, Cyberpunk, Minimal, Luxury

back_to_gallery_navigation.details: Back to Gallery button navigates correctly to the gallery view

create_digital_twin_button.details: Create Digital Twin button (data-testid='create-twin-btn') is present and clickable
